projects_list.name: Pocket Moon v1.0
projects_list.author: Jude Birch
projects_list.description:
Farming game made for Google Summer of Code.

Play as the owner of a farm and grow different crops over the seasons. Sell crops to buy more seeds and tools at the shop, and unlock more areas! You can also explore the world and discover the 21 different fish in the game!

Google Summer of Code Page: https://summerofcode.withgoogle.com/projects/5782435888889856
Gameplay: https://youtu.be/oMPMTiVN1Vs

Thanks to Jordan Smith for mentoring and supporting the project.

projects_list.name: CS:GO
projects_list.author: GameCompani7
projects_list.description:
Дата релиза!  (12.31.18!) 

Обновление! 
-Крутое обновление! 
- Обновил оружия теперь крутые! 
-Добавил Музыку в меню! 
-Поменял карты сделал красивыми
и 3D  все изменил! 
-Изменил Фон Меню! 
-Добавил загрузку карты! 


CSGO. От компании GameKompani7

Вы играете В роли Спецназа или же Терориста! 
Убейте всех за 40-45 секунд! 
Много оружие скины кейсы 4 карты! 
(Dast inferno Nyke office) 
Достигни Глобала! 
И стань лучшим! 
 Оцените нас! 
Видь разработка была долгой и трудной! 
Перезарядка всё тут есть ну почти! 
Возможно через 7 дней будит обновление так что
Ждите! 
Права/ GameKompani7®

projects_list.name: Slendytubbies 2D Part 2
projects_list.author: Felix Filip
projects_list.description:
V1.3 (Last Update) 12.02.18

OBJECTIVE:
you need to collect all 5 - 25 Custards while trying to avoid the Monsters

This game is proven to be the best and scariest game on Pocket Code, If you don't believe me just play the game

- 14 Maps with different Monsters

- Choose Between an Flashlight or an Night Vision Camera

- Animations

- All maps are Large

- You can change the Custard level from 5 to 25 Custards

-There's an Energy bar for the Flashlight and the Night Vision Camera so be careful and  don't use it to much

YouTube: Felix Filip
Game by: Felix Filip
Twitter: @FelixFilipYT
Roblox: FelixFilipYT
MCPE: Felix Filip AC

projects_list.author: joelio
projects_list.description: UCN FNAF

projects_list.name: Don't touch the white tiles!
projects_list.author: hej-wickie-hej
projects_list.description:
You have 25 seconds to tap as many of the black tiles as possible, starting from the bottom. Of course, don't touch the white ones!

Note that, although you must tap the black tiles one after the other starting from the lower ones, it is nevertheless possible to tap the next tiles already while they are still moving. Doing so gives exponentially more points, depending on how high the tiles were on the screen when you tapped them. 

Remark: All numbers and other text in images have been made with PicSay, available on Google Play, see http://catrob.at/PicSay and http://catrob.at/WordBalloonExplanation

projects_list.name: Super Mario Bros (version 10)
projects_list.author: Ayrat
projects_list.description:
----------------------------------------
Instructions:
It's finally here... version 10! It has got 5 brand new levels! And more are coming soon... Use arrow keys to move and jump. Collect the coins. Jump upon Goomba enemies (twice!) to beat them. Here's a walkthrough: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ONtHRrN-cDQ
----------------------------------------
Description:
I'm trying to make a Super Mario Bros game. It's not gonna be a remake. I just use the sprites and sounds. In version 10 there is a new enemy: Bullet Bill! And.. there's also music now! Feel free to remix and build a level yourself! Future plans: - add power ups - other enemies - and more... Credits for the sprites and sounds are for Nintendo. I found them here: http://spriters-resource.com/nes/supermariobros/ and http://themushroomkingdom.net/media/smb/wav
----------------------------------------

Made with Scratch2Catrobat Converter version 0.7.2.
Original Scratch project => https://scratch.mit.edu/projects/49905542

projects_list.author: Nintendo
projects_list.description:
----------------------------------------
Instructions:
Defeat Asriel Dreemurr! Use the arrow keys to dodge his attacks. Since Asriel is so powerful; if you get hit once, you die! WARNING! Very laggy on fullscreen! ANOTHER WARNING! May spoil the game!
----------------------------------------
Description:
Thanks to @Werkaec's Undertale: Memories of the Underground V3 (Rememberance) game with some of the coding. The fantastic Undertale game was made by Toby Fox!
----------------------------------------
